ip_outcome_note: Card frame names 'Nessa' and the depicted figure matches Nessa's canonical character design: tall dark-skinned woman, long indigo-teal braid past the waist, fashion-model contrapposto, blue-and-yellow gym uniform, posed against a coastal Hulbury-style lighthouse backdrop. Print art by take.

trivia_bullets.text: Nessa is the Water-type Gym Leader of Hulbury Stadium in both Pokemon Sword and Shield (not version-asymmetric). [Bulbapedia: Nessa, via WebSearch snippet]

In Galar canon Nessa works a dual career: competitive Gym Leader and professional fashion model — popular enough in both that, per Bulbapedia, many fans assume the two Nessas are different people. [Bulbapedia: Nessa, via WebSearch snippet]

Nessa's father is a fisher and her mother works the Hulbury marketplace, framing her Water-type specialty as inherited maritime context; she met fellow Gym Challenge participant Sonia (Magnolia's granddaughter) during the league. [Bulbapedia: Nessa, via WebSearch snippet]
Regular print art by take; matches the artist on the other Vivid Voltage Galar Gym Leader Supporters (Bea no. 147, Opal no. 158). [Bulbapedia: Nessa (Vivid Voltage 157), via WebSearch snippet]

Oracle text: 'Put up to 4 in any combination of Water Pokemon and Water Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand.' — a heavy-duty recursion Supporter for Water archetypes, prized in single-Prize Water decks during the SWSH era. [pokemon.com TCG database]
No flavor text printed. [pokemon.com TCG database]
